case_title: PERA, AARAN A. vs. ALVAREZ, RODOLFO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, RODOLFO

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, RODOLFO ALVAREZ, ROSA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 966 DOLORES STREET #4 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,200.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.00, STAYED UNTIL APR-15-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. NO ONE ELSE CAN CLAIM A RIGHT TO THE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISE. SECURITY DEP. OF $500.00 RETAINED BY PLTF. PERSONAL PROPERTY REMAINING ON PREMISE AFTER DEFT. VACATES BELONGS TO PLTF. GENERAL WAIVER OF CLAIMS. CIVIL CODE 1542 RIGHTS WAIVED BY DEFT. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
